description_long: This church is a rectangular brick structure with a tall, square bell tower topped by a domed roof and lantern. The main body of the building features a steeply pitched, slate-tiled roof and evenly spaced arched windows along the side walls. The facade of the tower displays arched openings, decorative brickwork, and a clock face, while the base of the tower includes a main entrance. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, with subtle weathering and moss visible near the foundation. The church sits on a grassy base, suggesting it is surrounded by a small lawn or churchyard. The overall design is simple yet stately, with architectural details that evoke a traditional European ecclesiastical style.
description: A stately brick church with a tall bell tower, arched windows, and a steep slate roof, set on a grassy base. The structure features classic architectural details and a prominent domed tower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance at the base of the tall bell tower and the full length of the pitched roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick nave, evenly spaced arched windows, and the height of the bell tower.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bell tower with visible arched windows and the back wall of the church.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the nave, arched windows, and the tower's architectural details.
